title: centaurea filarszkyi
intro: Centaurea filarszkyi, also known as the Hungarian penny-cress or cornflower, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Centaurea filarszkyi include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties, which can help to prevent infections. Centaurea filarszkyi is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
